channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-6403] soft lockup on MDS when client setting quota limits to a value >= ULLONG_MAX
item.description:
Recently we had a careless user setting the quota limits to a random large number on our production system. e.g.
lfs setquota -g y35 -i 5171717171717171609888 -I 5171717171717171905088 /short

MDS got stuck as a result of this:
2015-03-24 19:54:15 BUG: soft lockup - CPU#5 stuck for 67s! [mdt01_042:30397]
2015-03-24 19:54:15 Modules linked in: osp(U) mdd(U) lfsck(U) lod(U) mdt(U) mgs(U) mgc(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) osd_ldiskfs(U) lquota(U) ldiskfs(U) lustre(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ko2iblnd(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic crc32c_intel libcfs(U) raid1 coretemp ib_srp(U) scsi_transport_srp(U) ext4 jbd2 mbcache sunrpc cpufreq_ondemand acpi_cpufreq freq_table mperf rdma_ucm(U) ib_ucm(U) mlx5_ib(U) mlx5_core(U) mlx4_en(U) knem(U) ipmi_devintf dm_round_robin microcode sg iTCO_wdt iTCO_vendor_support sd_mod sb_edac edac_core sr_mod cdrom lpc_ich mfd_core i2c_i801 isci libsas scsi_transport_sas wmi power_meter lpfc scsi_transport_fc scsi_tgt crc_t10dif megaraid_sas ahci dm_multipath dm_mod rdma_cm(U) iw_cm(U) ib_umad(U) ib_uverbs(U) ib_ipoib(U) ib_cm(U) mlx4_ib(U) ib_sa(U) mlx4_core(U) ib_mad(U) ib_core(U) ib_addr(U) ipv6 compat(U) igb i2c_algo_bit i2c_core ptp pps_core dca [last unloaded: scsi_wait_scan]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 CPU 5
2015-03-24 19:54:16 Modules linked in: osp(U) mdd(U) lfsck(U) lod(U) mdt(U) mgs(U) mgc(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) osd_ldiskfs(U) lquota(U) ldiskfs(U) lustre(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ko2iblnd(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic crc32c_intel libcfs(U) raid1 coretemp ib_srp(U) scsi_transport_srp(U) ext4 jbd2 mbcache sunrpc cpufreq_ondemand acpi_cpufreq freq_table mperf rdma_ucm(U) ib_ucm(U) mlx5_ib(U) mlx5_core(U) mlx4_en(U) knem(U) ipmi_devintf dm_round_robin microcode sg iTCO_wdt iTCO_vendor_support sd_mod sb_edac edac_core sr_mod cdrom lpc_ich mfd_core i2c_i801 isci libsas scsi_transport_sas wmi power_meter lpfc scsi_transport_fc scsi_tgt crc_t10dif megaraid_sas ahci dm_multipath dm_mod rdma_cm(U) iw_cm(U) ib_umad(U) ib_uverbs(U) ib_ipoib(U) ib_cm(U) mlx4_ib(U) ib_sa(U) mlx4_core(U) ib_mad(U) ib_core(U) ib_addr(U) ipv6 compat(U) igb i2c_algo_bit i2c_core ptp pps_core dca [last unloaded: scsi_wait_scan]
2015-03-24 19:54:16
2015-03-24 19:54:16 Pid: 30397, comm: mdt01_042 Not tainted 2.6.32-431.23.3.el6_lustre.2.5.24.ddn2.x86_64 #1 FUJITSU PRIMERGY RX300 S7/D2939-A1
2015-03-24 19:54:16 RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffa0dbb730>] [<ffffffffa0dbb730>] qmt_adjust_qunit+0x3f0/0x660 [lquota]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 RSP: 0018:ffff883f385f5b90 EFLAGS: 00000286
2015-03-24 19:54:16 RAX: ffffffffffffffff RBX: ffff883f385f5bd0 RCX: 0000000000027b48
2015-03-24 19:54:16 RDX: 0000000000027b48 RSI: 0000000000000006 RDI: 0000000000010000
2015-03-24 19:54:16 RBP: ffffffff8100bb8e R08: 0000000000000000 R09: 0000000000000001
2015-03-24 19:54:16 R10: 0000000000000000 R11: 0000000000000001 R12: ffff883f385f5b70
2015-03-24 19:54:16 R13: ffff881eb868ad40 R14: ffff881f3fb19cc0 R15: ffffffffa0e063ff
2015-03-24 19:54:16 FS: 0000000000000000(0000) GS:ffff880028340000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
2015-03-24 19:54:16 CS: 0010 DS: 0018 ES: 0018 CR0: 000000008005003b
2015-03-24 19:54:16 CR2: 00007ff7eec03240 CR3: 000000404ed1b000 CR4: 00000000000407e0
2015-03-24 19:54:16 DR0: 0000000000000000 DR1: 0000000000000000 DR2: 0000000000000000
2015-03-24 19:54:16 DR3: 0000000000000000 DR6: 00000000ffff0ff0 DR7: 0000000000000400
2015-03-24 19:54:16 Process mdt01_042 (pid: 30397, threadinfo ffff883f385f4000, task ffff883f39ec2080)
2015-03-24 19:54:16 Stack:
2015-03-24 19:54:16 ffff883f385f5c28 00ff88400af11988 ffff883f385f5bd0 ffff88400af11918
2015-03-24 19:54:16 <d> ffff881f3f523000 ffff881eb868ad40 0000000000000000 ffff8815a51f3c80
2015-03-24 19:54:16 <d> ffff883f385f5c60 ffffffffa0db481b ffff880942278400 0000000000000002
2015-03-24 19:54:16 Call Trace:
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa0db481b>] ? qmt_set.clone.0+0x52b/0x700 [lquota]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa0db4f78>] ? qmt_quotactl+0x588/0x610 [lquota]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa0f04ce4>] ? mdt_quotactl+0x574/0x780 [mdt]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa0f08aba>] ? mdt_handle_common+0x52a/0x1470 [mdt]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa0f45985>] ? mds_regular_handle+0x15/0x20 [mdt]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa08d2cf5>] ? ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x385/0xc00 [ptlrpc]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa04e84ce>] ? cfs_timer_arm+0xe/0x10 [libcfs]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa04f93cf>] ? lc_watchdog_touch+0x6f/0x170 [libcfs]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa08ca3d9>] ? ptlrpc_wait_event+0xa9/0x2d0 [ptlrpc]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffff810546b9>] ? __wake_up_common+0x59/0x90
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa08d405d>] ? ptlrpc_main+0xaed/0x1740 [ptlrpc]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffffa08d3570>] ? ptlrpc_main+0x0/0x1740 [ptlrpc]
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffff8109abf6>] ? kthread+0x96/0xa0
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffff8100c20a>] ? child_rip+0xa/0x20
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffff8109ab60>] ? kthread+0x0/0xa0
2015-03-24 19:54:16 [<ffffffff8100c200>] ? child_rip+0x0/0x20
2015-03-24 19:54:16 Code: 44 00 00 4d 8b 65 78 48 8b 4b 40 4d 63 f6 4b 8d 34 76 48 01 f6 48 89 f2 49 0f af d4 48 01 ca 48 39 d0 0f 82 53 fe ff ff 0f 1f 00 <49> c1 e4 02 4c 89 e2 48 0f af d6 48 01 ca 48 39 d0 73 ed e9 38

It got stuck in qmt_adjust_qunit, and couldn't call dt_trans_stop in qmt_set(), as a result: the jbd2 got stuck:

2015-03-24 19:55:12 INFO: task jbd2/dm-48-8:4135 blocked for more than 120 seconds.
2015-03-24 19:55:12 Not tainted 2.6.32-431.23.3.el6_lustre.2.5.24.ddn2.x86_64 #1
2015-03-24 19:55:12 "echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message.
2015-03-24 19:55:12 jbd2/dm-48-8 D 0000000000000003 0 4135 2 0x00000000
2015-03-24 19:55:12 ffff881f56667d20 0000000000000046 0000000000016880 0000000000016880
2015-03-24 19:55:12 ffff882053648000 0000000000016880 0000000000016880 ffff881f5665d540
2015-03-24 19:55:12 ffff881f5665daf8 ffff881f56667fd8 000000000000fbc8 ffff881f5665daf8
2015-03-24 19:55:12 Call Trace:
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8109b2ce>] ? prepare_to_wait+0x4e/0x80
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffffa043b91f>] jbd2_journal_commit_transaction+0x19f/0x15a0 [jbd2]
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff810096f0>] ? __switch_to+0xd0/0x320
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff81083e1c>] ? lock_timer_base+0x3c/0x70
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8109afa0>] ? autoremove_wake_function+0x0/0x40
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffffa0441c18>] kjournald2+0xb8/0x220 [jbd2]
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8109afa0>] ? autoremove_wake_function+0x0/0x40
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffffa0441b60>] ? kjournald2+0x0/0x220 [jbd2]
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8109abf6>] kthread+0x96/0xa0
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8100c20a>] child_rip+0xa/0x20
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8109ab60>] ? kthread+0x0/0xa0
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8100c200>] ? child_rip+0x0/0x20

Then everyone got stuck trying to start a transaction, the filesystem was offline:

2015-03-24 19:55:12 INFO: task kswapd0:179 blocked for more than 120 seconds.
2015-03-24 19:55:12 Not tainted 2.6.32-431.23.3.el6_lustre.2.5.24.ddn2.x86_64 #1
2015-03-24 19:55:12 "echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message.
2015-03-24 19:55:12 kswapd0 D 0000000000000003 0 179 2 0x00000000
2015-03-24 19:55:12 ffff88204ed1bb90 0000000000000046 0000000000000000 ffff88204ed1bb54
2015-03-24 19:55:12 ffff880200000000 ffff88207fc24800 ffff880028356880 0000000000000199
2015-03-24 19:55:12 ffff88204eca3058 ffff88204ed1bfd8 000000000000fbc8 ffff88204eca3058
2015-03-24 19:55:12 Call Trace:
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8152a7de>] __mutex_lock_slowpath+0x13e/0x180
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff811a621a>] ? __destroy_inode+0x2a/0xa0
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8152a67b>] mutex_lock+0x2b/0x50
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffffa069c9bd>] lu_cache_shrink+0x4d/0x280 [obdclass]
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff811389aa>] shrink_slab+0x8a/0x1a0
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8113bd6a>] balance_pgdat+0x59a/0x820
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8113c124>] kswapd+0x134/0x3b0
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8109afa0>] ? autoremove_wake_function+0x0/0x40
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8113bff0>] ? kswapd+0x0/0x3b0
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8109abf6>] kthread+0x96/0xa0
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8100c20a>] child_rip+0xa/0x20
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8109ab60>] ? kthread+0x0/0xa0
2015-03-24 19:55:12 [<ffffffff8100c200>] ? child_rip+0x0/0x20
2015-03-24 19:55:12 INFO: task kswapd1:180 blocked for more than 120 seconds.
2015-03-24 19:55:12 Not tainted 2.6.32-431.23.3.el6_lustre.2.5.24.ddn2.x86_64 #1
2015-03-24 19:55:12 "echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message.

item.summary: soft lockup on MDS when client setting quota limits to a value >= ULLONG_MAX

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch http://review.whamcloud.com/14187/
Subject: LU-6403 quota: fix soft lockup in qmt_adjust_qunit
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
